description: Following Elon Musk's acquisition of Twitter in late 2022, a significant wave of users migrated to the decentralized platform Mastodon. The debate centered on whether decentralized, server-based social networking could effectively replace centralized corporate platforms.

key_events.description: Musk takes control of Twitter and initiates mass layoffs.
Mastodon server traffic spikes by 200% as academics and tech journalists join.
Twitter suspends links to Mastodon, causing a PR backlash.
User growth plateaus as critics cite usability and complexity barriers.

calibration_notes: Useful for measuring the friction of platform migration versus dissatisfaction with current leadership.
